77 namespace ax = Arcane::Accelerator;
78 
79 template <class FunctionT>
80 void FemModuleElasticity::
81 _assembleBilinearOperatorGpu(const FunctionT& compute_element_matrix)
82 {
83  std::cout<<"BILINEAROP ASSEMBLY ON ACCELERATOR"<<std::endl ;
84  const Int32 dim = mesh()->dimension();
85  UnstructuredMeshConnectivityView connectivity_view(mesh());
86  auto cell_node_cv = connectivity_view.cellNode();
87  auto node_cell_cv = connectivity_view.nodeCell();
88 
89  ItemGenericInfoListView nodes_infos(mesh()->nodeFamily());
90 
91  auto node_dof(m_dofs_on_nodes.nodeDoFConnectivityView());
92 
93  auto& matrixA = m_alien_bsr_format->getMatrixA();
94 
95  Arccore::SmallSpan<const Int32> allUIndex = m_alien_bsr_format->getAllUIndex() ;
96 
97  Arccore::SmallSpan<const Int32> node_lids = mesh()->ownNodes().view().localIds() ;
98  Arccore::SmallSpan<const Int32> all_node_lids = mesh()->allNodes().view().localIds() ;
99  Arccore::SmallSpan<const Int32> cell_lids = mesh()->allCells().view().localIds() ;
100  Arccore::SmallSpan<const Int32> own_cell_lids = mesh()->ownCells().view().localIds() ;
101  {
102  sycl::buffer<Integer,1> allUIndex_buffer(allUIndex.data(),sycl::range(allUIndex.size())) ;
103 
104  Alien::SYCL::ProfiledMatrixBuilder builder(matrixA, Alien::ProfiledMatrixOptions::eResetValues);
105  //builder.setParallelAssembleStencil(1,m_dof_dof_connection_offset.view(),m_dof_dof_connection_index.view()) ;
106 
107  Alien::ParallelEngine engine(*(acceleratorMng()->defaultQueue())) ;
108  engine.submit([&](ControlGroupHandler& handler)
109  {
110  auto& command = handler.command() ;
111 
112  //auto in_allUIndex = ax::viewIn(command,allUIndex) ;
113  auto in_allUIndex = allUIndex_buffer.get_access<sycl::access::mode::read>(handler.m_internal) ;
114  auto in_node_lids = ax::viewIn(command,node_lids) ;
115  //auto in_node_lids = node_lids_buffer.get_access<sycl::access::mode::read>(handler.m_internal) ;
116 
117  auto in_node_coord = ax::viewIn(command, m_node_coord);
118  auto in_lambda = ax::viewIn(command, m_cell_lambda);
119  auto in_mu = ax::viewIn(command, m_cell_mu);
120 
121  auto matrix_acc = builder.view(handler) ;
122  auto local_size = mesh()->ownNodes().size() ;
123 
124  //auto out = sycl::stream(1024, 768, handler.m_internal);
125 
126  handler.parallel_for(engine.maxNumThreads(),
127  [=](Alien::ParallelEngine::Item<1>::type item)
128  {
129  auto id = item.get_id(0) ;
130  for (std::size_t index = id; index < local_size; index += item.get_range()[0])
131  {
132  //out << "NODE LID = ";
133 
134  auto node0_lid = in_node_lids[index] ;
135  auto node0 = NodeLocalId(node0_lid) ;
136  for (auto cell : node_cell_cv.cells(node0))
137  {
138  auto K_e = compute_element_matrix(cell,
139  cell_node_cv,
140  in_node_coord,
141  in_lambda,
142  in_mu);
143  Int32 n1_index = 0;
144  for (auto node1 : cell_node_cv.nodes(cell))
145  {
146  Int32 n2_index = 0;
147  for (auto node2 : cell_node_cv.nodes(cell))
148  {
149  if(node1==node0)
150  {
151  for (Int32 i = 0; i < dim; ++i)
152  {
153  DoFLocalId dof1 = node_dof.dofId(node1, i);
154  Integer row_i = in_allUIndex[dof1];
155  for (Int32 j = 0; j < dim; ++j)
156  {
157  DoFLocalId dof2 = node_dof.dofId(node2, j);
158  Integer col_j = in_allUIndex[dof2];
159  auto eij = matrix_acc.entryIndex(row_i, col_j) ;
160  Real value = K_e(dim * n1_index + i, dim * n2_index + j);
161  matrix_acc[eij] += value;
162  }
163  }
164  }
165  ++n2_index;
166  }
167  ++n1_index;
168  }
169  }
170  } ;
171  }) ;
172  }) ;
173  }
174  /*
175  auto allUIndex = m_alien_bsr_format->getAllUIndex();
176  ENUMERATE_NODE(inode,mesh()->ownNodes())
177  {
178  auto node0 = *inode ;
179  for (auto cell : inode->cells())
180  {
181  auto K_e = _computeElementMatrixHexa8(cell) ;
182  Int32 n1_index = 0;
183  for (auto node1 : cell.nodes())
184  {
185  Int32 n2_index = 0;
186  for (auto node2 : cell.nodes())
187  {
188  if(node1==node0)
189  {
190  for (Int32 i = 0; i < dim; ++i)
191  {
192  DoFLocalId dof1 = node_dof.dofId(node1, i);
193  Integer row_i = allUIndex[dof1];
194  for (Int32 j = 0; j < dim; ++j)
195  {
196  DoFLocalId dof2 = node_dof.dofId(node2, j);
197  Integer col_j = allUIndex[dof2];
198  Real value = K_e(dim * n1_index + i, dim * n2_index + j);
199  if(row_i==3)
200  {
201  info()<<"ADD MATRIX("<<dof1<<","<<dof2<<") : "<<value<<" i="<<i<<" j="<<j<<" "<<n1_index<<" "<<n2_index;
202  info()<<"K CELL["<<cell.localId()<<"]";
203  K_e.dump(info().file()) ;
204  }
205  }
206  }
207  }
208  ++n2_index;
209  }
210  ++n1_index;
211  }
212  }
213  }*/
214 }
215 
216 void FemModuleElasticity::
217 _assembleBilinearOperatorAlienAcc()
218 {
219  UnstructuredMeshConnectivityView m_connectivity_view(mesh());
220  if (mesh()->dimension() == 2)
221  {
222  if (m_hex_quad_mesh)
223  {
224  _assembleBilinearOperatorGpu([=] ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE (CellLocalId cell,
225  const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv,
226  const Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView& node_coord,
227  const Accelerator::VariableCellRealInView& lambda,
228  const Accelerator::VariableCellRealInView& mu)
229  {
230  return computeElementMatrixQuad4Gpu(cell,cn_cv,node_coord,lambda,mu);
231  });
232  }
233  else
234  {
235  _assembleBilinearOperatorGpu([=] ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE (CellLocalId cell,
236  const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv,
237  const Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView& node_coord,
238  const Accelerator::VariableCellRealInView& lambda,
239  const Accelerator::VariableCellRealInView& mu)
240  {
241  return computeElementMatrixTria3SYCL(cell,cn_cv,node_coord,lambda,mu);
242  });
243  }
244  }
245  if (mesh()->dimension() == 3)
246  {
247  if (m_hex_quad_mesh)
248  {
249  _assembleBilinearOperatorGpu([=] ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE (CellLocalId cell,
250  const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv,
251  const Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView& node_coord,
252  const Accelerator::VariableCellRealInView& lambda,
253  const Accelerator::VariableCellRealInView& mu)
254  {
255  return computeElementMatrixHexa8Gpu(cell,cn_cv,node_coord,lambda,mu);
256  });
257  }
258  else
259  {
260  _assembleBilinearOperatorGpu([=] ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE (CellLocalId cell,
261  const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv,
262  const Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView& node_coord,
263  const Accelerator::VariableCellRealInView& lambda,
264  const Accelerator::VariableCellRealInView& mu)
265  {
266  return computeElementMatrixTetra4SYCL(cell,cn_cv,node_coord,lambda,mu);
267  });
268  }
269  }
270 }
271 
272 void FemModuleElasticity::
273 _defineMatrixProfileAcc()
274 {
275  auto func = [this](Alien::SYCL::MatrixProfiler& profiler,ConstArrayView<Integer> allUIndex)
276  {
277  return this->_defineMatrixProfile(profiler,allUIndex) ;
278  } ;
279  m_alien_bsr_format->computeProfile<Alien::SYCL::MatrixProfiler>(func);
280 }
281
